title: autonomous-skill config
description: Schema for ~/.claude/autonomous/config.json (global) and <project>/.autonomous/config.json (per-project). Precedence at read time: env var > project > global > defaults.

$schema.description: Optional schema URL for IDE/editor autocomplete and validation.

version.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking shape changes.

mode.description: Stable mode toggles consumed by the skill at startup and during dispatch.

worktrees.description: When true, each sprint runs in its own .worktrees/sprint-N/ git worktree; the main tree stays on the session branch. Env override: AUTONOMOUS_SPRINT_WORKTREES.

careful_hook.description: When true, dispatched workers get a PreToolUse hook (scripts/hooks/careful.sh) that blocks catastrophic Bash commands (rm -rf /, mkfs, force-push to main, DROP TABLE, etc.). Env override: AUTONOMOUS_WORKER_CAREFUL.

template.description: Worker-task template name. Ships with 'gstack' (uses /office-hours, /qa, /investigate, blocks /ship) and 'default' (generic). Custom templates live at templates/<name>/template.md.

scope.description: 'global' places OWNER.md at ~/.claude/autonomous/OWNER.md (shared across projects). 'project' routes it to <project>/.autonomous/OWNER.md.

last_generated.description: ISO timestamp of the last persona generation. Null until persona.py runs once.

experimental.description: EXPERIMENTAL — behavior under active development, subject to breaking changes. Enable only if you accept the instability.

vira_worktree.description: EXPERIMENTAL. Enables the vira worktree execution path. Implementation tracked for a future PR; setting this true currently has no effect beyond surfacing the warning.

parallel_sprints.description: EXPERIMENTAL. Enables parallel sprint dispatch with file-overlap guards (V2 worktree mode). When enabled the conductor will plan K independent sprints, dispatch them concurrently, and serialize merges. Implementation tracked for a future PR; setting this true currently has no effect beyond surfacing the warning.

created_at.description: When this config file was first written.
